            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = armor_piercing_bombs }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_fighter }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }

                NOT = { has_tech = cv_early_fighter }

                NOT = { has_tech = fighter1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = scout_plane1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { scout_plane1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = iw_small_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { iw_small_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_the_fire_rises = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1936_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1940_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1944_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y2000_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y2020_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y2024_the_fire_rises = yes
        }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = modern_medium_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { modern_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { modern_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2031 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2031_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2033_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2035 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2035_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
    }
}

            set_technology = { basic_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }

                NOT = { has_tech = improved_fire_control_system }

                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics

            }
            set_technology = { high_temperature_superconductors = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2029_the_fire_rises = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2029 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { dispersed_industry2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }

        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = oil_processing }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2031 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { industrial_software2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry7 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2031 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { concentrated_industry7 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry7 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2031 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { dispersed_industry7 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fuel_refining4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2031 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_the_fire_rises = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1940_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1943_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1950_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2019 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2019_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2023 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2023_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2027 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2027_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2031 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2031_the_fire_rises = yes

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2035 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2035_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
    }

                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

                NOT = { has_tech = energy_farms1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2023 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { energy_farms1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1938_the_fire_rises = yes
        }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1941_the_fire_rises = yes

                NOT = { has_tech = improved_quantum_radar }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            }
            set_technology = { improved_quantum_radar = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

        }

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1939_the_fire_rises = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = motorized_rocket_unit }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
                has_tech = rocket_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { motorized_rocket_unit = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { suicide_drone_tech2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y2027_the_fire_rises = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2027 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2027 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { rocket_artillery4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2022 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { anti_ship_missiles = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = short_range_missiles }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2022 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { short_range_missiles = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { tank_destroyer1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_artillery1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { sp_artillery1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = self_propelled_aa1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { self_propelled_aa1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antiair }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { interwar_antiair = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_the_fire_rises = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1934_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1940_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1941_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1943_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1945_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1934_the_fire_rises = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { improved_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { super_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { super_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = body_armor }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { body_armor = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = camouflage }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { camouflage = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = marines }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { marines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_mountaineers }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_mountaineers = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_rangers }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_rangers = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_rangers3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = elite_forces }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2027 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { elite_forces = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_the_fire_rises = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1918_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1934_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1936_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1941_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1980_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2000_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2012_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2018_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2022 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2022_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                NOT = { has_tech = light_tank4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { light_tank4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_medium_tank = 1 popup = no }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { sp_armored_signal_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_helicopter_transport_pods_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { sp_helicopter_transport_pods_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_helicopter_artillery_observers_tech }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { improved_rail_network = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_aerial_hospitals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_aerial_hospitals = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_improved_countermeasures }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2028_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2032_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2038 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2038_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
    }
}

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { blow_out_compartment_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = third_gen_nv_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { third_gen_nv_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_2 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1922_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1940_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y2000_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y2020_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y2024_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

        }

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { early_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_battleships_y2020_the_fire_rises = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ship_hull_super_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y2028_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1939_the_fire_rises = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_sonar }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_sonar = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { smoke_generator = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sonar }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { sonar = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_airplane_launcher }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_airplane_launcher = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_cruiser }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_the_fire_rises = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1922_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1936_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1938_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1942_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1943_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1980_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_naval_mines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mtg_at_sea_refueling }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { mtg_at_sea_refueling = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }

arm_grant_naval_submarines_the_fire_rises = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1939_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1943_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y2000_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y2020_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y2024_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y2028_the_fire_rises = yes
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_aip_engine_improved_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_the_fire_rises = 1 }
        }
    }
}
